name: iLabs nRF52 FOTA
description: LTE/HTTPS firmware-over-the-air updates for nRF52 devices with external QSPI flash. Downloads a gzip-compressed firmware slot image over a caller-supplied HTTPS transport, stream-stages it into a QSPI download partition, verifies SHA-256 against the slot header, and arms the Adafruit-fork bootloader settings block. Modem-agnostic: transport and system couplings are injected.
keywords: fota, firmware, ota, update, nrf52, lte, qspi
